subject: [PATCH v3 3/3] fuse: fix moving cancelled entry to ent_in_userspace list

2026-06-08.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) implementation for io_uring, where cancelling an entry would move it to the ent_in_userspace list and cause a crash when checking if the first entry on this list has expired. The fix involves freeing the cancelled entry directly in fuse_uring_cancel() instead of moving it to the ent_in_userspace list, which is safe because cancel is serialized with teardown via queue->lock. Additionally, the patch removes a gate that prevented aborting requests and stopping queues when there were still queued requests, as cancelled entries may have already dropped their references while requests are still pending.
